---
title: "Visualizando distribuciones"
---

# Librerías
```{python}
import altair as alt
import pandas as pd
from vega_datasets import data
```

# Dataset
```{python}
movies = pd.read_csv(
    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/erickedu85/dataset/master/movies.csv"
)
movies
```

# Gráfico de puntos y de líneas
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).mark_point().encode(
    alt.X('runtime')
)

alt.Chart(movies).mark_tick().encode(
    alt.X('runtime')
)
```

# Histograma
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('runtime', bin = alt.Bin(maxbins = 30)),
    alt.Y('count()')
)
```

# Gráfico de densidad
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).transform_density(
    'runtime',
    as_ = ['runtime', 'density']
).mark_area().encode(
    alt.X('runtime:Q'),
    alt.Y('density:Q')
)
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).transform_density(
    'runtime',
    groupby = ['genre'],
    as_ = ['runtime', 'density']
).mark_area().encode(
    alt.X('runtime:Q'),
    alt.Y('density:Q', stack = None),
    alt.Color('genre')
)
```
